author_identification.canonical_name_ar: موسى بن أحمد بن موسى بن سالم بن عيسى بن سالم الحجاوي المقدسي، ثم الصالحي، شرف الدين، أبو النجا
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent Hanbali jurist and author of a well-known concise work in Hanbali fiqh.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A widely used concise text in Hanbali fiqh, serving as a foundational study material.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the most important concise works in Hanbali fiqh, widely studied and referenced.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: عبد الرحمن بن علي بن محمد العسكر is a known editor of Islamic texts, particularly in Hanbali fiqh.
